hero.title: 58 years building medical equipment that institutions trust.
hero.description: Established in 1968 as a sterilization system manufacturer, PEIC now combines Mumbai-based manufacturing with integration support for global and Indian medical technologies.

legacy.label: Our Legacy
legacy.title: Engineering-led from day one.
paragraphs: Precision Electronics Instruments & Components was established in 1968 with a clear mandate: engineer medical sterilization systems that hospitals and institutions could rely on for 10-15+ years of daily operation. PEIC was one of the first institutions ever to receive BIS certification for its sterilization systems, and remains one of only few to be operating for almost six decades of continuous operation since receiving its license.

That manufacturing foundation expanded from BIS-certified autoclave production into technical integration for global and Indian medical equipment brands. The distribution business is built on deep equipment expertise, not catalogue selling.

Today, PEIC gives procurement and biomedical teams clearer ownership across specification, installation, commissioning, documentation, and long-term post-sale support for the entire hospital value chain.

Established in 1968, Precision Electronics Instruments & Components was built with a demanding purpose: to engineer sterilization systems that hospitals, laboratories, and public institutions could trust through 10-15+ years of daily service.

PEIC became one of the earliest Indian manufacturers to receive BIS licensing for medical sterilization systems, with certification dating back to 1976. Nearly six decades later, that record of continuous operation, compliance, and field performance remains the foundation of the company.

From that BIS-certified manufacturing base, PEIC has grown into an accountable technology partner for the wider hospital value chain, combining OEM engineering discipline with authorised integration of leading global and Indian medical equipment brands across specification, installation, commissioning, documentation, and long-term post-sale support.
